description.en: Resolve a prediction market by setting the winning outcome. Only authorized resolvers can resolve markets using the Gamma API.
description.de: Löse einen Prognosemarkt auf, indem du das gewinnende Ergebnis festlegst. Nur autorisierte Auflöser können Märkte über die Gamma-API auflösen.
description.es: Resolve a prediction market by setting the winning outcome. Only authorized resolvers can resolve markets using the Gamma API.
description.fr: Resolve a prediction market by setting the winning outcome. Only authorized resolvers can resolve markets using the Gamma API.
description.ro: Resolve a prediction market by setting the winning outcome. Only authorized resolvers can resolve markets using the Gamma API.
description.it: Resolve a prediction market by setting the winning outcome. Only authorized resolvers can resolve markets using the Gamma API.

vars.API_KEY: env:POLYMARKET_API_KEY|Get your API key from Polymarket at https://polymarket.com/settings/api

description.en: The ID of the market to resolve.
description.es: The ID of the market to resolve.
description.fr: The ID of the market to resolve.
description.ro: The ID of the market to resolve.
description.it: The ID of the market to resolve.
